creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Consumers (see below) built fine on 10.3 i386 with the patch here backported to 2017Q4.

  devel/bingrep
  devel/pijul
  devel/racer
  editors/xi-core
  sysutils/exa
  sysutils/flowgger
  textproc/ripgrep
  www/firefox (without files/patch-bug1401093)
  www/geckodriver
  x11/alacritty
